title: bouteloua dimorpha
intro: Bouteloua dimorpha, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bouteloua dimorpha include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial effects. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua dimorpha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
